mapper.select: SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, TEACHER_IDX, TEACHER_ID, MEMBER_KEY, TEACHER_NAME, TEACHER_SUBJECT_NAME, STAGE, TEACHER_BIRTH, TEACHER_SEX, TEACHER_PHONE, TEACHER_CELL_PHONE, TEACHER_NATIONALITY, TEACHER_ZIPCODE, TEACHER_ADDRESS, TEACHER_HISTORY, TEACHER_HISTORY_MANAGE, SELF_INFO_YN, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS ADD_DATE, CONFIRM_YN, FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE, teacher_location_code, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS', 'C0021', teacher_location_code) AS teacher_location_code_name, subject_cd, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS', 'C0023', subject_cd) AS subject_cd_name, teacher_email, teacher_education, teacher_experience, teacher_certifications, teacher_open_files,TEACHER_TEXT_AREA FROM TEACHER_REQ_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND CONFIRM_YN = 'Y' AND DELETE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY TEACHER_IDX DESC

${pagingTop} SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, TEACHER_IDX, TEACHER_ID, MEMBER_KEY, TEACHER_NAME, TEACHER_SUBJECT_NAME, STAGE, TEACHER_BIRTH, TEACHER_SEX, TEACHER_PHONE, TEACHER_CELL_PHONE, TEACHER_NATIONALITY, TEACHER_ZIPCODE, TEACHER_ADDRESS, TEACHER_HISTORY, TEACHER_HISTORY_MANAGE, SELF_INFO_YN, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS ADD_DATE, CONFIRM_YN, FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE, teacher_location_code, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS', 'C0021', teacher_location_code) AS teacher_location_code_name, subject_cd, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS', 'C0023', subject_cd) AS subject_cd_name, teacher_email, teacher_education, teacher_experience, teacher_certifications, teacher_open_files,TEACHER_TEXT_AREA, (SELECT z.homepage_name FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE z WHERE z.homepage_id = a.homepage_id AND ROWNUM = 1) AS homepage_name, TO_CHAR(mod_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS mod_date FROM TEACHER_REQ_MANAGE a WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND TEACHER_ID = #{teacher_id} ORDER BY TEACHER_IDX DESC ${pagingBottom}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEACHER_REQ_MANAGE WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND TEACHER_ID = #{teacher_id} ORDER BY TEACHER_IDX DESC

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, TEACHER_IDX, TEACHER_ID, MEMBER_KEY, TEACHER_NAME, TEACHER_SUBJECT_NAME, STAGE, TEACHER_BIRTH, TEACHER_SEX, TEACHER_PHONE, TEACHER_CELL_PHONE, TEACHER_NATIONALITY, TEACHER_ZIPCODE, TEACHER_ADDRESS, TEACHER_HISTORY, TEACHER_HISTORY_MANAGE, SELF_INFO_YN, CONFIRM_YN, FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE, teacher_location_code, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS', 'C0021', teacher_location_code) AS teacher_location_code_name, subject_cd, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS', 'C0023', subject_cd) AS subject_cd_name, teacher_email, teacher_education, teacher_experience, teacher_certifications, teacher_open_files,TEACHER_TEXT_AREA FROM TEACHER_REQ_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND TEACHER_IDX = #{teacher_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, TEACHER_IDX, TEACHER_ID, MEMBER_KEY, TEACHER_NAME, TEACHER_SUBJECT_NAME, STAGE, TEACHER_BIRTH, TEACHER_SEX, TEACHER_PHONE, TEACHER_CELL_PHONE, TEACHER_NATIONALITY, TEACHER_ZIPCODE, TEACHER_ADDRESS, TEACHER_HISTORY, TEACHER_HISTORY_MANAGE, SELF_INFO_YN, CONFIRM_YN, FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE, teacher_location_code, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS', 'C0021', teacher_location_code) AS teacher_location_code_name, subject_cd, getCodeIdToCodeName('CMS', 'C0023', subject_cd) AS subject_cd_name, teacher_email, teacher_education, teacher_experience, teacher_certifications, teacher_open_files,TEACHER_TEXT_AREA, (SELECT z.homepage_name FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE z WHERE z.homepage_id = a.homepage_id AND ROWNUM = 1) AS homepage_name, TO_CHAR(mod_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS mod_date FROM TEACHER_REQ_MANAGE a WHERE DELETE_YN = 'N' AND TEACHER_IDX = #{teacher_idx} AND TEACHER_ID = #{teacher_id}
SELECT TEACHER_IDX FROM TEACHER_REQ_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(TEACHER_IDX),0)+1 FROM TEACHER_REQ_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id}
INSERT INTO TEACHER_REQ_MANAGE ( HOMEPAGE_ID, TEACHER_IDX, TEACHER_ID, MEMBER_KEY, TEACHER_NAME, TEACHER_SUBJECT_NAME, STAGE, TEACHER_BIRTH, TEACHER_SEX, TEACHER_PHONE, TEACHER_CELL_PHONE, TEACHER_NATIONALITY, TEACHER_ZIPCODE, TEACHER_ADDRESS, TEACHER_HISTORY, TEACHER_HISTORY_MANAGE, SELF_INFO_YN, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, DELETE_YN, FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE, teacher_location_code, subject_cd, teacher_email, teacher_education, teacher_experience, teacher_certifications, teacher_open_files,TEACHER_TEXT_AREA ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{teacher_idx}, #{teacher_id}, #{member_key}, #{teacher_name}, #{teacher_subject_name}, #{stage}, #{teacher_birth}, #{teacher_sex}, #{teacher_phone}, #{teacher_cell_phone}, #{teacher_nationality}, #{teacher_zipcode}, #{teacher_address}, #{teacher_history}, #{teacher_history_manage}, #{self_info_yn}, SYSDATE, #{add_id}, 'N', #{file_name}, #{real_file_name}, #{file_extension}, #{file_size}, #{teacher_location_code}, #{subject_cd}, #{teacher_email}, #{teacher_education}, #{teacher_experience}, #{teacher_certifications}, #{teacher_open_files},#{teacher_text_area} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE TEACHER_REQ_MANAGE SET TEACHER_SUBJECT_NAME = #{teacher_subject_name}, STAGE = #{stage}, TEACHER_SEX = #{teacher_sex}, TEACHER_PHONE = #{teacher_phone}, TEACHER_CELL_PHONE = #{teacher_cell_phone}, TEACHER_NATIONALITY = #{teacher_nationality}, TEACHER_ZIPCODE = #{teacher_zipcode}, TEACHER_ADDRESS = #{teacher_address}, TEACHER_HISTORY = #{teacher_history}, TEACHER_HISTORY_MANAGE = #{teacher_history_manage}, SELF_INFO_YN = #{self_info_yn}, teacher_location_code = #{teacher_location_code}, subject_cd = #{subject_cd}, teacher_email = #{teacher_email}, teacher_education = #{teacher_education}, teacher_experience = #{teacher_experience}, teacher_certifications = #{teacher_certifications}, teacher_open_files = #{teacher_open_files}, TEACHER_TEXT_AREA = #{teacher_text_area},
FILE_NAME = #{file_name}, REAL_FILE_NAME = #{real_file_name}, FILE_EXTENSION = #{file_extension}, FILE_SIZE = #{file_size},
MOD_ID = #{mod_id}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND TEACHER_IDX = #{teacher_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
mapper.delete: UPDATE TEACHER_REQ_MANAGE SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND TEACHER_IDX = #{teacher_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT TEACHER_HISTORY FROM TEACHER_REQ_MANAGE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND TEACHER_IDX = #{teacher_idx}
